key.name: pass-command
key.description: Command used for the Host backend.

key.name: backend
key.description: Backend used to open the password store. Valid values are "integrated" and "host".

key.name: new-pass-file-template
key.description: Lines added after the password line when creating a new password entry.

key.name: username-fallback-mode
key.description: Username fallback used when a pass file has no encrypted username field. Valid values are "folder" and "filename".

key.name: password-generator-min-lowercase
key.description: Minimum number of lowercase letters in generated passwords. Use 0 to disable lowercase letters.

key.name: password-generator-min-uppercase
key.description: Minimum number of uppercase letters in generated passwords. Use 0 to disable uppercase letters.

key.name: password-generator-min-numbers
key.description: Minimum number of digits in generated passwords. Use 0 to disable numbers.

key.name: password-generator-min-symbols
key.description: Minimum number of symbols in generated passwords. Use 0 to disable symbols.

key.name: ripasso-own-fingerprint
key.description: Fingerprint of the private key used by the integrated backend.

key.name: sync-private-keys-with-host
key.summary: Sync private keys with the host
key.description: Keep app-managed private keys aligned with the host GPG keyring when host access is available.
